product_title: Vesgantti 68" Loveseat Sofa Black, Comfy Corduroy Couch with Spring Cushion and Solid Wood, Modern Extra Deep Seat for Bedroom, Living Room, Office
high_level_description: A 68-inch corduroy-upholstered loveseat designed for living rooms, bedrooms, and offices, featuring spring-supported cushions and solid wood construction. It offers an extra-deep 21.3-inch seat, a 772 lb weight capacity, and tool-less easy assembly.

best_image.reasoning: Chose the image with zero occlusions. Among the zero-occlusion candidates, this one is front-facing, centered, and shows the entire couch; measurement overlays are acceptable. A close-up with zero occlusion was not chosen because it does not show the full couch.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81od.notes: Lifestyle scene likely with a coffee table/props partially in front of the couch, creating noticeable occlusion.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/717M.notes: Front-facing, centered shot with measurement overlay; no objects covering the couch and the entire couch is visible.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81ot.notes: Angled view with minor props (e.g., throw/blanket or decor) touching/covering part of the couch.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81xb.notes: Detail/close-up crop with no occluding objects, but the full couch is not in frame (used as a tiebreaker against it).

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81wj.notes: Mostly unobstructed; minor soft goods (pillows/throw) present that slightly cover surfaces.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81fj.notes: Clean studio shot but includes decorative pillows/soft goods that lightly occlude parts of the seat/back.
